GenRelatedTopicsPrompt.description: I'm writing Wikipedia page for topic mentioned below Please identify recommend Wikipedia pages on closely related subjects insights interesting aspects commonly associated typical content structure included in Wikipedia pages similar topics List urls separate lines
GenRelatedTopicsPrompt.dspy: I'm writing a Wikipedia page for a topic mentioned below. Please identify and recommend some Wikipedia pages on closely related subjects...

GenPerspectivesPrompt.input: topic + examples wiki page outlines related topics for inspiration tocs concatenated
GenPerspectivesPrompt.output: perspectives P = {p1..pN} + p0 basic fact writer focusing broadly covering basic facts
GenPerspectivesPrompt.description: You need to select group Wikipedia editors who will work together create comprehensive article on topic Each represents different perspective role affiliation related to topic You can use other Wikipedia pages related topics inspiration For each editor add description what they will focus on Format 1. short summary editor1: description...

GenQnPrompt.input: topic + persona perspective p + conv history dlg_history
GenQnPrompt.description: You are experienced Wikipedia writer want edit specific page Besides identity as Wikipedia writer you have specific focus when researching topic Now you are chatting with expert to get information Ask good questions to get more useful information When no more question say Thank you so much for your help! to end conversation Please only ask one question at a time don't ask what you have asked before Your questions related topic you want write

GenQueriesPrompt.description: You want answer question using Google search What do you type search box? Write queries format - query1 - query2...
GenQueriesPrompt.search: search_and_sift queries via YouRM You.com search API search_top_k 10 ground truth excluded

GenAnswerPrompt.input: topic + conv Question + gathered information info sources
GenAnswerPrompt.output: answer a informative every sentence supported
GenAnswerPrompt.description: You are expert who can use information effectively chatting with Wikipedia writer who wants write Wikipedia page on topic you know You have gathered related information will now use information to form response Make response as informative as possible make sure every sentence is supported by gathered information

DirectGenOutlinePrompt.description: Write outline for Wikipedia page Format Use # Title to indicate section title ## Title subsection ### subsubsection etc Do not include other information Leverage internal knowledge LLMs

RefineOutlinePrompt.input: topic t + OD + convos {C0..CN} N+1 conversations M rounds each
RefineOutlinePrompt.description: Improve outline for Wikipedia page You already have draft outline covering general info Now you want improve based on information learned from information-seeking conversation to make more comprehensive Format same # ## ###

algorithm1: P0=basic fact writer R=[] related_topics=gen_related_topics(t) tocs=[] foreach related_t get_wiki_article extract_toc P=gen_perspectives(t,tocs) P=[P0]+P[:N] convos=[] foreach p in P convo_history=[] for i=1..M q=gen_qn(t,p,dlg_history) convo_history.append(q) queries=gen_queries(t,q) sources=search_and_sift(queries) a=gen_ans(t,q,sources) convo_history.append(a) R.append(sources) convos.append(convo_history) OD=direct_gen_outline(t) O=refine_outline(t,OD,convos) return O,R
writing_stage: Building upon references R collected outline O developed during prewriting stage full-length article composed section by section Section title headings subsections used retrieve relevant documents from R based semantic similarity Sentence-BERT embeddings LLM then prompted generate section with citations Once all sections generated concatenated form full-length article LLM then prompted delete repeated information improve coherence Furthermore in alignment Wikipedia stylistic norms LLM also utilized synthesize summary entire article forming lead section at beginning Titles to generate article section by section

evaluation.FreshWiki: top 100 most-edited pages per month Feb2022-Sep2023 filter B-class quality ORES exclude list articles no subsections plain text only to avoid data leakage mitigating Wikipedia text trained LLMs process repeated future dates new LLMs emerge
evaluation.heading_soft_recall: Given set A={Ai} soft count inverse sum similarity count(Ai)=1/sum_j Sim(Ai,Aj) Sim=cos embed(Ai) embed(Aj) embed paraphrase-MiniLM-L6-v2 Sentence-Transformers cardinality card(A)=sum_i count(Ai) soft heading recall=card(G∩P)/card(G) intersection via union card(G∩P)=card(G)+card(P)-card(G∪P)
evaluation.heading_entity_recall: percentage named entities in human-written article headings covered by O extract FLAIR NER Akbik et al 2019
evaluation.prometheus: Prometheus Kim et al 2023 13B open-source evaluator LLM assess long-form text based customized 1-5 scale rubric grade article aspects Interest level Coherence Organization Relevance Focus Coverage Table8 grading rubric best used score5 reference answer adding reference exceeds context limit omit reference trim input article within 2000 words iteratively removing contents shortest section ensure fit context window
evaluation.citation_quality: citation recall precision based definition Gao et al 2023 Use Mistral 7B
evaluation.expert: experienced Wikipedia editors found STORM outperforms outline-driven RAG baseline organized +25% absolute increase broad coverage +10% breadth organization, challenges source bias transfer bias on Internet affects articles over-association unrelated facts fabricate connections

implementation.LM: gpt-3.5-turbo question asking, gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct other parts, also gpt-4 drafting refining outline
implementation.retrieval: YouRM You.com search API https://documentation.you.com/api-reference/search compatible other search engines BingSearch VectorRM SerperRM BraveRM SearXNG DuckDuckGoSearchRM TavilySearchRM GoogleSearch AzureAISearch ground truth excluded
implementation.runner: STORMWikiRunner STORMWikiRunnerArguments output_dir max_conv_turn max_perspective search_top_k max_thread_num device vector_db_mode do_research do_generate_outline do_generate_article do_polish_article
implementation.engine_lm_configs: conv_simulator_lm cheap/fast split queries synthesize answers conversation, question_asker_lm, outline_gen_lm more powerful organizing collected info, article_gen_lm more powerful verifiable text citations, article_polish_lm
implementation.installation: pip install knowledge-storm, conda create storm python3.11 pip install -r requirements.txt, litellm integration language models embedding models
implementation.co_storm: collaborative discourse protocol turn management policy Co-STORM LLM experts generates answers grounded external knowledge sources and/or raises follow-up questions based discourse history Moderator generates thought-provoking questions inspired by information discovered retriever but not directly used previous turns Question generation grounded Human user takes initiative either observe discourse gain deeper understanding topic or actively engage conversation injecting utterances steer discussion focus dynamic updated mind map organize collected information hierarchical concept structure aiming build shared conceptual space between human user and system mind map proven help reduce mental load when discourse goes long in-depth highly modular using dspy

decisions: D1 Discover perspectives via related topics TOCs vs direct prompting 30 questions
D2 N perspectives 5 plus p0 basic fact writer vs single
D4 Retrieval engine YouRM vs BingSearch vs VectorRM etc
D5 Search queries generation vs direct question as query
D7 Draft OD topic only vs refined O topic+OD+convos
D8 Section generation retrieve relevant docs via Sentence-BERT vs all R
D9 Polish delete repeated vs keep raw concatenation
D10 Lead summary synthesis vs no lead
D11 LM choice gpt-3.5-turbo question asking vs instruct other vs gpt-4 drafting vs ollama local
D12 Vector DB mode offline Qdrant vs online
D13 FreshWiki filtering B-class ORES exclude list no subsections plain text only
D14 Evaluation Prometheus 13B 1-5 rubric without reference trimmed 2000 words vs with reference
D15 Hyperparams search_top_k 10 max_thread_num 1 device cpu
loops: tocs extraction foreach related_t get_wiki_article extract_toc len(related_topics)
Simulate conversations foreach p in P N+1=6 perspectives
Conversation rounds i=1..M M=5 per perspective
Search and sift search_and_sift queries per queries search_top_k 10
Section-by-section generation for each section in O len(O)
Sentence-BERT retrieval relevant docs from R per section len(R)
FreshWiki top 100 per month Feb2022-Sep2023 20 months *100 raw then filter
Heading soft recall count(Ai) sum_j Sim K items per set
Prometheus trimming iterative removing shortest section until 2000 words
